We demonstrate that our framework can be integrated with diverse robot simulators to generate physically accurate fire behavior, benchmark thermal hazards encountered by robotic platforms, and collect realistic multimodal perceptual data. Crucially, its real-time performance supports human-in-the-loop teleoperation, enabling the successful training of reactive, multimodal policies via Behavioral Cloning. By adding fire dynamics to robot simulations, FaaS provides a scalable pathway toward safer, more reliable deployment of robots in fire scenarios.
tldr: The paper introduces Fire as a Service (FaaS), a co-simulation framework that adds high-fidelity fire dynamics to robot simulators, enabling more realistic training and evaluation of robots in fire scenarios.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Fire as a Service (FaaS)，一个协同仿真框架，它将高保真火焰动力学添加到机器人模拟器中，从而能够更真实地训练和评估在火灾场景中的机器人。
summary_zh: 现有的大多数机器人模拟器侧重于刚体动力学和照片级渲染，而很大程度上忽略了表征真实火灾环境的热和光学复杂现象。对于设想成为未来消防员的机器人而言，这种局限性阻碍了在危险场景中部署之前进行可靠的能力评估和生成具有代表性的训练数据。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 Fire as a Service (FaaS)，这是一种新颖的异步协同仿真框架，它利用高保真和计算高效的火灾模拟来增强现有的机器人模拟器。我们的流水线使机器人能够在不干扰高频刚体控制回路的情况下，体验精确的多物种热力学传热和视觉上一致的体积烟雾。我们证明了我们的框架可以与不同的机器人模拟器集成，以生成物理上精确的火灾行为、标定机器人平台遇到的热危害，并收集逼真的多模态感知数据。至关重要的是，其实时性能支持人机回路遥操作，从而能够通过行为克隆成功训练反应式多模态策略。通过将火灾动力学加入到机器人模拟中，FaaS为在火灾场景中更安全、更可靠地部署机器人提供了一条可扩展的途径。

title: PRIOR: Perceptive Learning for Humanoid Locomotion with Reference Gait Priors
summary: Training perceptive humanoid locomotion policies that traverse complex terrains with natural gaits remains an open challenge, typically demanding multi-stage training pipelines, adversarial objectives, or extensive real-world calibration. We present PRIOR, an efficient and reproducible framework built on Isaac Lab that achieves robust terrain traversal with human-like gaits through a simple yet effective design: (i) a parametric gait generator that supplies stable reference trajectories derived from motion capture without adversarial training, (ii) a GRU-based state estimator that infers terrain geometry directly from egocentric depth images via self-supervised heightmap reconstruction, and (iii) terrain-adaptive footstep rewards that guide foot placement toward traversable regions. Through systematic analysis of depth image resolution trade-offs, we identify configurations that maximize terrain fidelity under real-time constraints, substantially reducing perceptual overhead without degrading traversal performance. Comprehensive experiments across terrains of varying difficulty-including stairs, boxes, and gaps-demonstrate that each component yields complementary and essential performance gains, with the full framework achieving a 100% traversal success rate. We will open-source the complete PRIOR framework, including the training pipeline, parametric gait generator, and evaluation benchmarks, to serve as a reproducible foundation for humanoid locomotion research on Isaac Lab.
tldr: The paper introduces PRIOR, a framework for training perceptive humanoid locomotion policies using a parametric gait generator, a GRU-based state estimator for terrain geometry inference from depth images, and terrain-adaptive footstep rewards, achieving robust terrain traversal with human-like gaits and open-sourcing the framework.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为PRIOR的框架，用于训练具有感知能力的人形机器人运动策略。该框架使用参数化步态生成器、基于GRU的状态估计器（用于从深度图像推断地形几何）以及地形自适应步点奖励，实现了在复杂地形上的稳健运动，并实现了人类般的步态。该框架将开源。
summary_zh: 训练具有感知能力的人形机器人以自然步态遍历复杂地形仍然是一个开放性挑战，通常需要多阶段训练流程、对抗性目标或大量的真实世界标定。我们提出了PRIOR，这是一个构建于Isaac Lab之上的高效且可复现的框架，通过一个简单而有效的设计，实现了鲁棒的地形遍历和类人步态：（i）一个参数化步态生成器，提供从动作捕捉导出的稳定参考轨迹，无需对抗训练；（ii）一个基于GRU的状态估计器，通过自监督高度图重建，直接从自我中心的深度图像中推断地形几何信息；以及（iii）适应地形的步点奖励，引导足部放置到可遍历区域。通过对深度图像分辨率权衡的系统分析，我们确定了可在实时约束下最大化地形保真度的配置，在不降低遍历性能的情况下大幅减少感知开销。在包括楼梯、盒子和间隙在内的不同难度地形上的全面实验表明，每个组件都产生了互补且关键的性能提升，完整的框架实现了100%的遍历成功率。我们将开源完整的PRIOR框架，包括训练流程、参数化步态生成器和评估基准，作为Isaac Lab上人形机器人运动研究的可复现基础。

title: Safety-Guaranteed Imitation Learning from Nonlinear Model Predictive Control for Spacecraft Close Proximity Operations
summary: This paper presents a safety-guaranteed, runtime-efficient imitation learning framework for spacecraft close proximity control. We leverage Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) for safety certificates and Control Lyapunov Functions (CLFs) for stability as unified design principles across data generation, training, and deployment. First, a nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) expert enforces CBF constraints to provide safe reference trajectories. Second, we train a neural policy with a novel CBF-CLF-informed loss and DAgger-like rollouts with curriculum weighting, promoting data-efficiency and reducing future safety filter interventions. Third, at deployment a lightweight one-step CBF-CLF quadratic program minimally adjusts the learned control input to satisfy hard safety constraints while encouraging stability. We validate the approach for ESA-compliant close proximity operations, including fly-around with a spherical keep-out zone and final approach inside a conical approach corridor, using the Basilisk high-fidelity simulator with nonlinear dynamics and perturbations. Numerical experiments indicate stable convergence to decision points and strict adherence to safety under the filter, with task performance comparable to the NMPC expert while significantly reducing online computation. A runtime analysis demonstrates real-time feasibility on a commercial off-the-shelf processor, supporting onboard deployment for safety-critical on-orbit servicing.
tldr: This paper presents a safety-guaranteed imitation learning framework using CBFs and CLFs to train a neural policy for spacecraft proximity operations, and validates its performance on a high-fidelity simulator with real-time feasibility.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于控制障碍函数（CBFs）和控制李雅普诺夫函数（CLFs）的安全保障模仿学习框架，用于训练航天器近距离操作的神经策略，并在高保真模拟器上验证了其实时可行和性能。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种安全保障、运行时高效的模仿学习框架，用于航天器近距离逼近控制。我们利用控制屏障函数(CBFs)作为安全证书，控制李雅普诺夫函数(CLFs)作为稳定性保证，将它们作为数据生成、训练和部署的统一设计原则。首先，利用非线性模型预测控制(NMPC)专家执行CBF约束，以提供安全参考轨迹。其次，我们采用一种新型的CBF-CLF信息损失函数和类似DAgger的课程加权滚动优化方法训练神经策略，从而提高数据效率并减少未来安全滤波器的干预。第三，在部署时，一个轻量级的一步CBF-CLF二次规划能以最小的调整幅度来满足硬性安全约束，同时确保稳定性。我们使用Basilisk高保真度仿真器，利用非线性动力学和扰动，验证了该方法对符合欧空局标准的近距离操作的有效性，包括在球形禁区周围的环绕飞行以及在锥形接近走廊内的最终接近。数值实验表明，在滤波器作用下，系统能稳定收敛到决策点，并严格遵守安全约束，同时任务性能与NMPC专家相当，并显著降低了在线计算量。运行时分析表明，在商用现成处理器上该方法具有实时可行性，支持在安全攸关的在轨服务中进行机载部署。

title: ViTac-Tracing: Visual-Tactile Imitation Learning of Deformable Object Tracing
summary: Deformable objects often appear in unstructured configurations. Tracing deformable objects helps bringing them into extended states and facilitating the downstream manipulation tasks. Due to the requirements for object-specific modeling or sim-to-real transfer, existing tracing methods either lack generalizability across different categories of deformable objects or struggle to complete tasks reliably in the real world. To address this, we propose a novel visual-tactile imitation learning method to achieve one-dimensional (1D) and two-dimensional (2D) deformable object tracing with a unified model. Our method is designed from both local and global perspectives based on visual and tactile sensing. Locally, we introduce a weighted loss that emphasizes actions maintaining contact near the center of the tactile image, improving fine-grained adjustment. Globally, we propose a tracing task loss that helps the policy to regulate task progression. On the hardware side, to compensate for the limited features extracted from visual information, we integrate tactile sensing into a low-cost teleoperation system considering both the teleoperator and the robot. Extensive ablation and comparative experiments on diverse 1D and 2D deformable objects demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, achieving an average success rate of 80% on seen objects and 65% on unseen objects.
tldr: This paper introduces a visual-tactile imitation learning method (ViTac-Tracing) for tracing deformable objects, using a weighted loss for local adjustment and a tracing task loss for global progression, demonstrating effectiveness on both seen and unseen objects.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于追踪可变形物体的视觉触觉模仿学习方法（ViTac-Tracing），使用加权损失进行局部调整，并使用追踪任务损失进行全局进展，并在已见和未见物体上都展示了有效性。
summary_zh: 可变形物体通常以非结构化配置出现。追踪可变形物体有助于将其引导至延展状态，并方便后续的操控任务。由于对特定对象建模或从仿真到现实迁移的要求，现有的追踪方法要么缺乏在不同类别可变形物体上的泛化性，要么难以在真实世界中可靠地完成任务。为解决此问题，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉-触觉模仿学习方法，以实现具有统一模型的一维 (1D) 和二维 (2D) 可变形物体追踪。我们的方法基于视觉和触觉感知，从局部和全局角度进行设计。在局部上，我们引入了一种加权损失，该损失强调维持触觉图像中心附近接触的动作，从而提高细粒度调整能力。在全局上，我们提出了一种追踪任务损失，该损失有助于策略规范任务进展。在硬件方面，为了弥补从视觉信息中提取到的有限特征，我们将触觉感知集成到低成本的遥操作系统中，同时考虑遥操作员和机器人。在不同的 1D 和 2D 可变形物体上进行的大量消融和对比实验证明了我们方法的有效性，在已知对象上实现了 80% 的平均成功率，在未知对象上实现了 65% 的平均成功率。

title: ROFT-VINS: Robust Feature Tracking-based Visual-Inertial State Estimation for Harsh Environment
summary: SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping) and Odometry are important systems for estimating the position of mobile devices, such as robots and cars, utilizing one or more sensors. Particularly in camera-based SLAM or Odometry, effectively tracking visual features is important as it significantly impacts system performance. In this paper, we propose a method that leverages deep learning to robustly track visual features in monocular camera images. This method operates reliably even in textureless environments and situations with rapid lighting changes. Additionally, we evaluate the performance of our proposed method by integrating it into VINS-Fusion (Monocular-Inertial), a commonly used Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) system.
tldr: This paper presents a deep learning-based visual feature tracking method for robust monocular Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) in challenging environments with poor texture or rapid lighting changes, demonstrating its performance within the VINS-Fusion framework.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的视觉特征跟踪方法，用于在纹理匮乏或光照快速变化等恶劣环境中实现鲁棒的单目视觉惯性里程计（VIO），并在VINS-Fusion框架中验证了其性能。
summary_zh:
以下是翻译结果：

SLAM（同时定位与地图构建）和里程计是利用一个或多个传感器估计移动设备（例如机器人和汽车）位置的重要系统。尤其是在基于相机的SLAM或里程计中，有效跟踪视觉特征至关重要，因为它会显著影响系统性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用深度学习来鲁棒地跟踪单目相机图像中视觉特征的方法。该方法即使在无纹理环境和光照快速变化的情况下也能可靠地运行。此外，我们通过将所提出的方法集成到常用的视觉惯性里程计（VIO）系统VINS-Fusion（单目-惯性）中来评估其性能。

title: CSSDF-Net: Safe Motion Planning Based on Neural Implicit Representations of Configuration Space Distance Field
summary: High-dimensional manipulator operation in unstructured environments requires a differentiable, scene-agnostic distance query mechanism to guide safe motion generation. Existing geometric collision checkers are typically non-differentiable, while workspace-based implicit distance models are hindered by the highly nonlinear workspace--configuration mapping and often suffer from poor convergence; moreover, self-collision and environment collision are commonly handled as separate constraints. We propose Configuration-Space Signed Distance Field-Net (CSSDF-Net), which learns a continuous signed distance field directly in configuration space to provide joint-space distance and gradient queries under a unified geometric notion of safety. To enable zero-shot generalization without environment-specific retraining, we introduce a spatial-hashing-based data generation pipeline that encodes robot-centric geometric priors and supports efficient retrieval of risk configurations for arbitrary obstacle point sets. The learned distance field is integrated into safety-constrained trajectory optimization and receding-horizon MPC, enabling both offline planning and online reactive avoidance. Experiments on a planar arm and a 7-DoF manipulator demonstrate stable gradients, effective collision avoidance in static and dynamic scenes, and practical inference latency for large-scale point-cloud queries, supporting deployment in previously unseen environments.
tldr: The paper presents CSSDF-Net, a neural network that learns a configuration-space signed distance field for safe robot motion planning by providing differentiable collision checking even within dynamic environments. This allows for zero-shot generalization and integration with trajectory optimization and MPC.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了CSSDF-Net，一种学习配置空间有符号距离场的神经网络，用于安全机器人运动规划，通过提供可微的碰撞检测，即使在动态环境中也能有效工作。这实现了零样本泛化，并可与轨迹优化和MPC集成。
summary_zh: 在非结构化环境中进行高维机械臂操作需要一种可微的、场景无关的距离查询机制来引导安全运动生成。现有的几何碰撞检测器通常是不可微的，而基于工作空间的隐式距离模型则受到高度非线性的工作空间-构型映射的限制，且常常收敛性较差；此外，自碰撞和环境碰撞通常被作为单独的约束处理。我们提出了一种构型空间有符号距离场网络（CSSDF-Net），它可以直接在构型空间中学习连续的有符号距离场，从而在统一的安全几何概念下提供关节空间距离和梯度查询。为了实现无需环境特定重新训练的零样本泛化能力，我们引入了一种基于空间哈希的数据生成流程，该流程编码了以机器人为中心的几何先验，并支持高效检索任意障碍物点集的风险构型。学习到的距离场被集成到安全约束的轨迹优化和滚动时域模型预测控制（MPC）中，从而实现离线规划和在线响应式避障。在一个平面臂和一个7自由度机械臂上的实验表明，该方法具有稳定的梯度、在静态和动态场景中的有效避障能力，以及适用于大规模点云查询的实际推理延迟，从而支持在之前未见过的环境中部署。

title: Graph-of-Constraints Model Predictive Control for Reactive Multi-agent Task and Motion Planning
summary: Sequences of interdependent geometric constraints are central to many multi-agent Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) problems. However, existing methods for handling such constraint sequences struggle with partially ordered tasks and dynamic agent assignments. They typically assume static assignments and cannot adapt when disturbances alter task allocations. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Graph-of-Constraints Model Predictive Control (GoC-MPC), a generalized sequence-of-constraints framework integrated with MPC. GoC-MPC naturally supports partially ordered tasks, dynamic agent coordination, and disturbance recovery. By defining constraints over tracked 3D keypoints, our method robustly solves diverse multi-agent manipulation tasks-coordinating agents and adapting online from visual observations alone, without relying on training data or environment models. Experiments demonstrate that GoC-MPC achieves higher success rates, significantly faster TAMP computation, and shorter overall paths compared to recent baselines, establishing it as an efficient and robust solution for multi-agent manipulation under real-world disturbances. Our supplementary video and code can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/goc-mpc/home .
tldr: The paper introduces Graph-of-Constraints Model Predictive Control (GoC-MPC) for multi-agent task and motion planning, enabling robustness in dynamic environments without relying on training data or environment models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了用于多智能体任务和运动规划的约束图模型预测控制（GoC-MPC），无需依赖训练数据或环境模型即可在动态环境中实现鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 相互依赖的几何约束序列是许多多智能体任务与运动规划（TAMP）问题的核心。然而，现有的处理此类约束序列的方法难以应对部分排序的任务和动态的智能体分配。它们通常假设静态分配，并且无法在扰动改变任务分配时进行调整。为了克服这些局限性，我们引入了基于约束图的模型预测控制（GoC-MPC），这是一个集成了MPC的通用约束序列框架。GoC-MPC 自然地支持部分排序的任务、动态的智能体协调以及抗扰恢复。通过定义在跟踪的3D关键点上的约束，我们的方法能够稳健地解决各种多智能体操控任务——仅通过视觉观测来协调智能体并在线适应，而无需依赖训练数据或环境模型。实验表明，与最新的基线方法相比，GoC-MPC在成功率方面更高，TAMP计算速度明显更快，总体路径也更短，从而证明了其是现实世界扰动下多智能体操控的高效稳健解决方案。我们的补充视频和代码可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/goc-mpc/home 找到。

title: RE-SAC: Disentangling aleatoric and epistemic risks in bus fleet control: A stable and robust ensemble DRL approach
summary: Bus holding control is challenging due to stochastic traffic and passenger demand. While deep reinforcement learning (DRL) shows promise, standard actor-critic algorithms suffer from Q-value instability in volatile environments. A key source of this instability is the conflation of two distinct uncertainties: aleatoric uncertainty (irreducible noise) and epistemic uncertainty (data insufficiency). Treating these as a single risk leads to value underestimation in noisy states, causing catastrophic policy collapse. We propose a robust ensemble soft actor-critic (RE-SAC) framework to explicitly disentangle these uncertainties. RE-SAC applies Integral Probability Metric (IPM)-based weight regularization to the critic network to hedge against aleatoric risk, providing a smooth analytical lower bound for the robust Bellman operator without expensive inner-loop perturbations. To address epistemic risk, a diversified Q-ensemble penalizes overconfident value estimates in sparsely covered regions. This dual mechanism prevents the ensemble variance from misidentifying noise as a data gap, a failure mode identified in our ablation study. Experiments in a realistic bidirectional bus corridor simulation demonstrate that RE-SAC achieves the highest cumulative reward (approx. -0.4e6) compared to vanilla SAC (-0.55e6). Mahalanobis rareness analysis confirms that RE-SAC reduces Oracle Q-value estimation error by up to 62% in rare out-of-distribution states (MAE of 1647 vs. 4343), demonstrating superior robustness under high traffic variability.
tldr: The paper introduces RE-SAC, a robust ensemble soft actor-critic method, to improve DRL-based bus fleet control by disentangling aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties, leading to more stable and robust performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了RE-SAC，一种鲁棒的集成软Actor-Critic方法，通过解耦随机不确定性和认知不确定性，来改进基于DRL的公交车队控制，从而实现更稳定和更强大的性能。
summary_zh: 公交车辆延时控制因随机交通状况和乘客需求而极具挑战性。尽管深度强化学习（DRL）展现出潜力，但标准的Actor-Critic算法在不稳定的环境中存在Q值不稳定性问题。这种不稳定性的一个关键来源是两种不同不确定性的混淆：偶然不确定性（不可约噪声）和认知不确定性（数据不足）。将它们视为单一风险会导致噪声状态下的价值低估，从而导致灾难性的策略崩溃。我们提出了一个鲁棒集成软Actor-Critic（RE-SAC）框架，以显式地解耦这些不确定性。RE-SAC将基于积分概率度量（IPM）的权重正则化应用于Critic网络，以对冲偶然风险，从而为鲁棒贝尔曼算子提供平滑的解析下界，而无需昂贵的内循环扰动。为了解决认知风险，一个多样化的Q集成惩罚在稀疏覆盖区域中过度自信的价值估计。这种双重机制可防止集成方差将噪声误识别为数据间隙，这是我们在消融研究中发现的一种失效模式。在一个真实的双向公交走廊仿真实验中，结果表明，与原始SAC（-0.55e6）相比，RE-SAC获得了最高的累积奖励（约-0.4e6）。马氏距离稀有性分析证实，RE-SAC在罕见分布外状态下将Oracle Q值估计误差降低了高达62%（MAE为1647 vs. 4343），表明在高交通变异性下具有更强的鲁棒性。

title: HRI-SA: A Multimodal Dataset for Online Assessment of Human Situational Awareness during Remote Human-Robot Teaming
summary: Maintaining situational awareness (SA) is critical in human-robot teams. Yet, under high workload and dynamic conditions, operators often experience SA gaps. Automated detection of SA gaps could provide timely assistance for operators. However, conventional SA measures either disrupt task flow or cannot capture real-time fluctuations, limiting their operational utility. To the best of our knowledge, no publicly available dataset currently supports the systematic evaluation of online human SA assessment in human-robot teaming. To advance the development of online SA assessment tools, we introduce HRI-SA, a multimodal dataset from 30 participants in a realistic search-and-rescue human-robot teaming context, incorporating eye movements, pupil diameter, biosignals, user interactions, and robot data. The experimental protocol included predefined events requiring timely operator assistance, with ground truth SA latency of two types (perceptual and comprehension) systematically obtained by measuring the time between assistance need onset and resolution. We illustrate the utility of this dataset by evaluating standard machine learning models for detecting perceptual SA latencies using generic eye-tracking features and contextual features. Results show that eye-tracking features alone effectively classified perceptual SA latency (recall=88.91%, F1=67.63%) using leave-one-group-out cross-validation, with performance improved through contextual data fusion (recall=91.51%, F1=80.38%). This paper contributes the first public dataset supporting the systematic evaluation of SA throughout a human-robot teaming mission, while also demonstrating the potential of generic eye-tracking features for continuous perceptual SA latency detection in remote human-robot teaming.
tldr: The paper introduces HRI-SA, a multimodal dataset for online assessment of human situational awareness in human-robot teams during search and rescue scenarios, and demonstrates the utility of eye-tracking features for detecting perceptual SA latency.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为HRI-SA的多模态数据集，用于在线评估人机协作中人类的情境感知（SA），尤其是在搜索和救援场景中。论文还展示了眼动追踪特征在检测感知SA延迟方面的应用。
summary_zh: 维持情境感知（SA）在人机协作团队中至关重要。然而，在高负荷和动态条件下，操作员经常会遇到情境感知差距。自动检测情境感知差距可以为操作员提供及时的帮助。但是，传统的情境感知测量方法要么会干扰任务流程，要么无法捕捉实时波动，从而限制了其操作实用性。据我们所知，目前没有公开可用的数据集支持对人机协作中在线人类情境感知评估进行系统评估。为了促进在线情境感知评估工具的开发，我们推出了HRI-SA，这是一个来自30名参与者在真实搜索和救援人机协作情境中的多模态数据集，包含眼动、瞳孔直径、生物信号、用户交互和机器人数据。实验协议包括需要操作员及时帮助的预定义事件，通过测量协助需求发生到解决之间的时间，系统地获得了两种类型（感知型和理解型）的真实情境感知延迟。我们通过评估使用通用眼动追踪特征和上下文特征检测感知型情境感知延迟的标准机器学习模型，来说明该数据集的效用。结果表明，仅使用眼动追踪特征，通过留一组交叉验证，就能有效地对感知型情境感知延迟进行分类（召回率=88.91%，F1=67.63%），并且通过上下文数据融合来提高性能（召回率=91.51%，F1=80.38%）。本文贡献了第一个支持在整个人机协作任务中系统评估情境感知的公共数据集，同时也展示了通用眼动追踪特征在远程人机协作中持续检测感知型情境感知延迟的潜力。

title: Sparse3DTrack: Monocular 3D Object Tracking Using Sparse Supervision
summary: Monocular 3D object tracking aims to estimate temporally consistent 3D object poses across video frames, enabling autonomous agents to reason about scene dynamics. However, existing state-of-the-art approaches are fully supervised and rely on dense 3D annotations over long video sequences, which are expensive to obtain and difficult to scale. In this work, we address this fundamental limitation by proposing the first sparsely supervised framework for monocular 3D object tracking. Our approach decomposes the task into two sequential sub-problems: 2D query matching and 3D geometry estimation. Both components leverage the spatio-temporal consistency of image sequences to augment a sparse set of labeled samples and learn rich 2D and 3D representations of the scene. Leveraging these learned cues, our model automatically generates high-quality 3D pseudolabels across entire videos, effectively transforming sparse supervision into dense 3D track annotations. This enables existing fully-supervised trackers to effectively operate under extreme label sparsity. Extensive experiments on the KITTI and nuScenes datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves tracking performance, achieving an improvement of up to 15.50 p.p. while using at most four ground truth annotations per track.
tldr: The paper introduces a sparsely supervised framework, Sparse3DTrack, for monocular 3D object tracking, which overcomes the limitation of expensive dense 3D annotations by employing 2D query matching and 3D geometry estimation to generate high-quality pseudo-labels and significantly improve tracking performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个稀疏监督的单目3D物体跟踪框架 Sparse3DTrack，通过利用 2D 查询匹配和 3D 几何估计生成高质量的伪标签，克服了昂贵的密集 3D 注释的限制，并显著提高了跟踪性能。
summary_zh: 单目3D目标跟踪旨在估计视频帧间时间上一致的3D目标姿态，从而使自动驾驶代理能够推理场景的动态特性。然而，现有最先进的方法是完全监督的，并依赖于长期视频序列上的密集3D标注，这些标注获取成本高昂且难以扩展。在这项工作中，我们通过提出第一个用于单目3D目标跟踪的稀疏监督框架，来解决这一根本性局限。我们的方法将任务分解为两个连续的子问题：2D查询匹配和3D几何估计。这两个组件都利用图像序列的时空一致性来扩充一组稀疏的标记样本，并学习丰富的场景2D和3D表示。利用这些学习到的线索，我们的模型能够自动生成高质量的3D伪标签，覆盖整个视频，从而有效地将稀疏监督转换为密集的3D轨迹标注。这使得现有的完全监督跟踪器能够在极端的标签稀疏性下有效运行。在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法显著提高了跟踪性能，在使用每个轨迹最多四个真实标注的情况下，性能提升高达15.50个百分点。

title: Offload or Overload: A Platform Measurement Study of Mobile Robotic Manipulation Workloads
summary: Mobile robotic manipulation--the ability of robots to navigate spaces and interact with objects--is a core capability of physical AI. Foundation models have led to breakthroughs in their performance, but at a significant computational cost. We present the first measurement study of mobile robotic manipulation workloads across onboard, edge, and cloud GPU platforms. We find that the full workload stack is infeasible to run on smaller onboard GPUs, while larger onboard GPUs drain robot batteries several hours faster. Offloading alleviates these constraints but introduces its own challenges, as additional network latency degrades task accuracy, and the bandwidth requirement makes naive cloud offloading impractical. Finally, we quantify opportunities and pitfalls of sharing compute across robot fleets. We believe our measurement study will be crucial to designing inference systems for mobile robots.
tldr: This paper benchmarks the performance of mobile robotic manipulation workloads on different computing platforms (onboard, edge, cloud) and highlights the trade-offs between compute location, task accuracy, and power consumption. It suggests how the study contributes to a better design of inference systems for mobile robots.
tldr_zh: 本文对移动机器人操作工作负载在不同计算平台（板载、边缘、云）上的性能进行了基准测试，并强调了计算位置、任务准确性和功耗之间的权衡。 建议该研究有助于更好地设计移动机器人的推理系统。
summary_zh:
摘要：
移动机器人操作——机器人导航空间并与物体交互的能力——是物理人工智能的核心能力。 基础模型已经使其性能取得了突破，但计算成本也显著增加。 我们首次对车载、边缘和云 GPU 平台上的移动机器人操作工作负载进行了测量研究。 我们发现，完整的工作负载堆栈无法在较小的车载 GPU 上运行，而较大的车载 GPU 会更快地耗尽机器人电池，缩短其续航时间几个小时。 卸载计算任务可以缓解这些限制，但也带来了自身的挑战，因为额外的网络延迟会降低任务精度，并且带宽需求使得简单的云卸载变得不切实际。 最后，我们量化了跨机器人集群共享计算资源的机遇和陷阱。 我们相信我们的测量研究对于设计移动机器人的推理系统至关重要。

title: Semantic Segmentation and Depth Estimation for Real-Time Lunar Surface Mapping Using 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Navigation and mapping on the lunar surface require robust perception under challenging conditions, including poorly textured environments, high-contrast lighting, and limited computational resources. This paper presents a real-time mapping framework that integrates dense perception models with a 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representation. We first benchmark several models on synthetic datasets generated with the LuPNT simulator, selecting a stereo dense depth estimation model based on Gated Recurrent Units for its balance of speed and accuracy in depth estimation, and a convolutional neural network for its superior performance in detecting semantic segments. Using ground truth poses to decouple the local scene understanding from the global state estimation, our pipeline reconstructs a 120-meter traverse with a geometric height accuracy of approximately 3 cm, outperforming a traditional point cloud baseline without LiDAR. The resulting 3DGS map enables novel view synthesis and serves as a foundation for a full SLAM system, where its capacity for joint map and pose optimization would offer significant advantages. Our results demonstrate that combining semantic segmentation and dense depth estimation with learned map representations is an effective approach for creating detailed, large-scale maps to support future lunar surface missions.
tldr: This paper presents a real-time lunar surface mapping framework using 3D Gaussian Splatting, integrating semantic segmentation and stereo depth estimation achieving high accuracy in geometric reconstruction without LiDAR.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于3D高斯溅射的实时月球表面mapping框架，集成了语义分割和立体深度估计，无需激光雷达即可实现高精度的几何重建。
summary_zh: 月球表面的导航和建图需要在具有挑战性的环境下实现稳健的感知，包括纹理稀疏的环境、高对比度的光照以及有限的计算资源。本文提出了一种集成了密集感知模型和3D高斯溅射（3DGS）表示的实时建图框架。我们首先使用LuPNT模拟器生成的合成数据集对多个模型进行基准测试，选择了一个基于门控循环单元的立体密集深度估计模型，因为它在深度估计的速度和精度之间取得了平衡，以及一个卷积神经网络，因为它在检测语义分割方面表现出色。通过使用地面真值位姿将局部场景理解与全局状态估计解耦，我们的流水线重建了一条120米的轨迹，几何高度精度约为3厘米，性能优于没有激光雷达的传统点云基线。所生成的3DGS地图能够实现新视角合成，并为完整的SLAM系统奠定基础，在该系统中，其联合地图和位姿优化能力将提供显著优势。我们的结果表明，将语义分割和密集深度估计与学习到的地图表示相结合，是创建详细、大规模地图以支持未来月球表面任务的有效方法。

title: DreamPartGen: Semantically Grounded Part-Level 3D Generation via Collaborative Latent Denoising
summary: Understanding and generating 3D objects as compositions of meaningful parts is fundamental to human perception and reasoning. However, most text-to-3D methods overlook the semantic and functional structure of parts. While recent part-aware approaches introduce decomposition, they remain largely geometry-focused, lacking semantic grounding and failing to model how parts align with textual descriptions or their inter-part relations. We propose DreamPartGen, a framework for semantically grounded, part-aware text-to-3D generation. DreamPartGen introduces Duplex Part Latents (DPLs) that jointly model each part's geometry and appearance, and Relational Semantic Latents (RSLs) that capture inter-part dependencies derived from language. A synchronized co-denoising process enforces mutual geometric and semantic consistency, enabling coherent, interpretable, and text-aligned 3D synthesis. Across multiple benchmarks, DreamPartGen delivers state-of-the-art performance in geometric fidelity and text-shape alignment.
tldr: DreamPartGen introduces a novel text-to-3D generation framework using Duplex Part Latents and Relational Semantic Latents to generate semantically grounded, part-aware 3D objects that align with text descriptions and capture inter-part dependencies, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: DreamPartGen 提出了一种新的文本到 3D 生成框架，它使用双重部分潜在变量 (Duplex Part Latents) 和关系语义潜在变量 (Relational Semantic Latents) 来生成语义明确的、具有部件意识的 3D 对象，这些对象与文本描述对齐并捕获部件之间的依赖关系，从而实现最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 理解并生成具有语义意义部件组成的3D对象是人类感知和推理的基础。然而，大多数文本到3D方法忽略了部件的语义和功能结构。尽管最近的部件感知方法引入了解码，但它们仍然主要侧重于几何形状，缺乏语义基础，并且未能建模部件如何与文本描述对齐或它们之间的关系。我们提出了DreamPartGen，一个用于语义基础的、部件感知的文本到3D生成框架。DreamPartGen引入了双重部件潜在变量（DPLs），共同建模每个部件的几何形状和外观，以及关系语义潜在变量（RSLs），捕获从语言中导出的部件间依赖关系。一个同步的协同去噪过程强制执行相互的几何和语义一致性，从而实现连贯、可解释且文本对齐的3D合成。在多个基准测试中，DreamPartGen在几何保真度和文本-形状对齐方面均实现了最先进的性能。

title: OS-Themis: A Scalable Critic Framework for Generalist GUI Rewards
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has the potential to improve the robustness of GUI agents in stochastic environments, yet training is highly sensitive to the quality of the reward function. Existing reward approaches struggle to achieve both scalability and performance. To address this, we propose OS-Themis, a scalable and accurate multi-agent critic framework. Unlike a single judge, OS-Themis decomposes trajectories into verifiable milestones to isolate critical evidence for decision making and employs a review mechanism to strictly audit the evidence chain before making the final verdict. To facilitate evaluation, we further introduce OmniGUIRewardBench (OGRBench), a holistic cross-platform benchmark for GUI outcome rewards, where all evaluated models achieve their best performance under OS-Themis. Extensive experiments on AndroidWorld show that OS-Themis yields a 10.3% improvement when used to support online RL training, and a 6.9% gain when used for trajectory validation and filtering in the self-training loop, highlighting its potential to drive agent evolution.
tldr: The paper introduces OS-Themis, a scalable multi-agent critic framework for GUI reward functions in Reinforcement Learning, and a new benchmark (OGRBench), showing improved performance in stochastic GUI environments compared to other reward approaches.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OS-Themis，一个可扩展的多代理评论框架，用于强化学习中的GUI奖励函数，以及一个新的基准（OGRBench），与其他的奖励方法相比，在随机GUI环境中表现出更好的性能。
summary_zh: 强化学习(RL)有潜力提高GUI代理在随机环境中的鲁棒性，但训练对奖励函数的质量高度敏感。现有的奖励方法难以兼顾可扩展性和性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了OS-Themis，一个可扩展且精确的多代理评论家框架。与单一评判者不同，OS-Themis将轨迹分解为可验证的里程碑，以隔离关键证据用于决策，并采用审查机制来严格审核证据链，然后作出最终判决。为了便于评估，我们进一步引入了OmniGUIRewardBench (OGRBench)，一个用于GUI结果奖励的整体跨平台基准，所有评估模型在OS-Themis下都获得了最佳性能。在AndroidWorld上的大量实验表明，当用于支持在线RL训练时，OS-Themis产生了10.3%的改进，当用于自训练循环中的轨迹验证和过滤时，产生了6.9%的增益，突显了其驱动代理进化的潜力。

title: ARIADNE: A Perception-Reasoning Synergy Framework for Trustworthy Coronary Angiography Analysis
summary: Conventional pixel-wise loss functions fail to enforce topological constraints in coronary vessel segmentation, producing fragmented vascular trees despite high pixel-level accuracy. We present ARIADNE, a two-stage framework coupling preference-aligned perception with RL-based diagnostic reasoning for topologically coherent stenosis detection. The perception module employs DPO to fine-tune the Sa2VA vision-language foundation model using Betti number constraints as preference signals, aligning the policy toward geometrically complete vessel structures rather than pixel-wise overlap metrics. The reasoning module formulates stenosis localization as a Markov Decision Process with an explicit rejection mechanism that autonomously defers ambiguous anatomical candidates such as bifurcations and vessel crossings, shifting from coverage maximization to reliability optimization. On 1,400 clinical angiograms, ARIADNE achieves state-of-the-art centerline Dice of 0.838, reduces false positives by 41% compared to geometric baselines. External validation on multi-center benchmarks ARCADE and XCAD confirms generalization across acquisition protocols. This represents the first application of DPO for topological alignment in medical imaging, demonstrating that preference-based learning over structural constraints mitigates topological violations while maintaining diagnostic sensitivity in interventional cardiology workflows.
tldr: The paper introduces ARIADNE, a framework combining preference-aligned vision-language models and RL-based reasoning for topologically coherent stenosis detection in coronary angiograms, achieving state-of-the-art results.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ARIADNE，一个结合了偏好对齐的视觉-语言模型和基于强化学习的推理框架，用于冠状动脉血管造影中拓扑连贯的狭窄检测，并取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 传统像素级损失函数无法在冠状动脉血管分割中施加拓扑约束，尽管像素级精度很高，但仍产生碎片化的血管树。我们提出了ARIADNE，一个两阶段框架，将偏好对齐的感知与基于强化学习的诊断推理相结合，用于拓扑连贯的狭窄检测。感知模块采用DPO(直接偏好优化)来微调Sa2VA视觉-语言基础模型，以Betti数约束作为偏好信号，使策略对齐到几何上完整的血管结构，而不是像素级的重叠指标。推理模块将狭窄定位构建为一个马尔可夫决策过程，具有显式的拒绝机制，可以自主地推迟模糊的解剖候选目标，如分叉和血管交叉点，从而从覆盖率最大化转向可靠性优化。在1400张临床血管造影片上，ARIADNE达到了0.838的先进中心线Dice，相比几何基线减少了41%的假阳性。在多中心基准ARCADE和XCAD上的外部验证证实了跨采集协议的泛化能力。这代表了DPO在医学图像拓扑对齐中的首次应用，表明基于结构约束的偏好学习可以减少拓扑违规，同时在介入心脏病学工作流程中保持诊断敏感性。

title: Points-to-3D: Structure-Aware 3D Generation with Point Cloud Priors
summary: Recent progress in 3D generation has been driven largely by models conditioned on images or text, while readily available 3D priors are still underused. In many real-world scenarios, the visible-region point cloud are easy to obtain from active sensors such as LiDAR or from feed-forward predictors like VGGT, offering explicit geometric constraints that current methods fail to exploit. In this work, we introduce Points-to-3D, a diffusion-based framework that leverages point cloud priors for geometry-controllable 3D asset and scene generation. Built on a latent 3D diffusion model TRELLIS, Points-to-3D first replaces pure-noise sparse structure latent initialization with a point cloud priors tailored input formulation.A structure inpainting network, trained within the TRELLIS framework on task-specific data designed to learn global structural inpainting, is then used for inference with a staged sampling strategy (structural inpainting followed by boundary refinement), completing the global geometry while preserving the visible regions of the input priors.In practice, Points-to-3D can take either accurate point-cloud priors or VGGT-estimated point clouds from single images as input. Experiments on both objects and scene scenarios consistently demonstrate superior performance over state-of-the-art baselines in terms of rendering quality and geometric fidelity, highlighting the effectiveness of explicitly embedding point-cloud priors for achieving more accurate and structurally controllable 3D generation.
tldr: The paper introduces Points-to-3D, a diffusion-based framework leveraging point cloud priors for controllable 3D generation, achieving superior performance in rendering quality and geometric fidelity compared to state-of-the-art baselines. It enables geometry-controllable 3D asset and scene generation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Points-to-3D，一个基于扩散模型的框架，利用点云先验进行可控的3D生成，在渲染质量和几何保真度方面优于现有技术。它实现了几何可控的3D资产和场景生成。
summary_zh: 3D生成领域的最新进展主要由图像或文本条件下的模型驱动，而易于获得的3D先验信息仍未得到充分利用。在许多现实场景中，可见区域点云很容易从激光雷达等主动传感器或像 VGGT 这样的前馈预测器中获得，从而提供显式的几何约束，但目前的方法未能有效利用这些约束。在这项工作中，我们提出 Points-to-3D，这是一个基于扩散的框架，利用点云先验来实现几何可控的3D资产和场景生成。Points-to-3D 建立在潜在3D扩散模型 TRELLIS 之上，首先用针对点云先验量身定制的输入公式，替换纯噪声稀疏结构潜在变量初始化。然后，利用一个结构补全网络，该网络在 TRELLIS 框架内，基于旨在学习全局结构补全的特定任务数据进行训练，并采用分阶段采样策略（结构补全后进行边界细化）进行推理，从而完成全局几何形状，同时保留输入先验的可见区域。在实践中，Points-to-3D 可以将精确的点云先验或来自单张图像的 VGGT 估计点云作为输入。在对象和场景情境下的实验都一致表明，在渲染质量和几何保真度方面，本方法优于最先进的基线方法，突出了显式嵌入点云先验对于实现更准确和结构可控的3D生成的有效性。

title: Discovering What You Can Control: Interventional Boundary Discovery for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Selecting relevant state dimensions in the presence of confounded distractors is a causal identification problem: observational statistics alone cannot reliably distinguish dimensions that correlate with actions from those that actions cause. We formalize this as discovering the agent's Causal Sphere of Influence and propose Interventional Boundary Discovery IBD, which applies Pearl's do-operator to the agent's own actions and uses two-sample testing to produce an interpretable binary mask over observation dimensions. IBD requires no learned models and composes with any downstream RL algorithm as a preprocessing step. Across 12 continuous control settings with up to 100 distractor dimensions, we find that: (1) observational feature selection can actively select confounded distractors while discarding true causal dimensions; (2) full-state RL degrades sharply once distractors outnumber relevant features by roughly 3:1 in our benchmarks; and (3)IBD closely tracks oracle performance across all distractor levels tested, with gains transferring across SAC and TD3.
tldr: This paper introduces Interventional Boundary Discovery (IBD), a method for identifying relevant state dimensions in reinforcement learning by applying interventions to the agent's actions and using two-sample testing. They show IBD outperforms observational feature selection and improves RL performance in the presence of distractors.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为干预边界发现 (IBD) 的方法，通过对智能体的动作进行干预并使用双样本检验，来识别强化学习中的相关状态维度。 他们表明，IBD 优于观察特征选择，并提高了在存在干扰因素的情况下 RL 的性能。
summary_zh: 在存在混淆注意力分散物的情况下，选择相关的状态维度是一个因果识别问题：仅仅依靠观测统计数据无法可靠地区分与动作相关的维度和由动作引起的维度。 我们将其形式化为发现智能体的因果影响范围，并提出干预边界发现IBD，它将Pearl的do-算子应用于智能体自身的动作，并使用双样本检验来生成关于观测维度的可解释的二元掩码。 IBD不需要学习模型，并且可以作为预处理步骤与任何下游强化学习算法结合使用。 在具有高达100个注意力分散维度的12个连续控制环境中，我们发现：（1）观测特征选择可能会主动选择混淆的注意力分散物，同时丢弃真正的因果维度；（2）完全状态强化学习在注意力分散物数量超过相关特征约3:1时，性能急剧下降；以及（3）IBD在所有测试的注意力分散物水平上都与先知性能紧密跟踪，增益可以在SAC和TD3之间转移。

title: MonoArt: Progressive Structural Reasoning for Monocular Articulated 3D Reconstruction
summary: Reconstructing articulated 3D objects from a single image requires jointly inferring object geometry, part structure, and motion parameters from limited visual evidence. A key difficulty lies in the entanglement between motion cues and object structure, which makes direct articulation regression unstable. Existing methods address this challenge through multi-view supervision, retrieval-based assembly, or auxiliary video generation, often sacrificing scalability or efficiency. We present MonoArt, a unified framework grounded in progressive structural reasoning. Rather than predicting articulation directly from image features, MonoArt progressively transforms visual observations into canonical geometry, structured part representations, and motion-aware embeddings within a single architecture. This structured reasoning process enables stable and interpretable articulation inference without external motion templates or multi-stage pipelines. Extensive experiments on PartNet-Mobility demonstrate that OM achieves state-of-the-art performance in both reconstruction accuracy and inference speed. The framework further generalizes to robotic manipulation and articulated scene reconstruction.
tldr: MonoArt introduces a novel framework for reconstructing articulated 3D objects from a single image by progressively transforming visual observations into structured representations, achieving state-of-the-art performance in accuracy and speed.
tldr_zh: MonoArt 提出了一种新的框架，通过将视觉观察逐步转换为结构化表示，从单张图像重建铰接 3D 对象，并在准确性和速度方面均实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 从单张图像重建铰接式3D物体需要在有限的视觉证据中联合推断物体几何形状、部件结构和运动参数。一个关键的难点在于运动线索与物体结构之间的纠缠导致直接关节回归不稳定。现有方法通过多视角监督、基于检索的组装或辅助视频生成来解决这一挑战，通常会牺牲可扩展性或效率。我们提出了MonoArt，一个基于渐进式结构推理的统一框架。MonoArt不是直接从图像特征预测关节，而是在单一架构内逐步将视觉观测转化为规范几何、结构化部件表示和运动感知嵌入。这种结构化的推理过程能够实现稳定且可解释的关节推断，无需外部运动模板或多阶段流程。在PartNet-Mobility上的大量实验表明，MonoArt在重建精度和推理速度方面均实现了最先进的性能。该框架进一步推广到机器人操作和铰接场景重建。

title: Reconstruction Matters: Learning Geometry-Aligned BEV Representation through 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) perception serves as a cornerstone for autonomous driving, offering a unified spatial representation that fuses surrounding-view images to enable reasoning for various downstream tasks, such as semantic segmentation, 3D object detection, and motion prediction. However, most existing BEV perception frameworks adopt an end-to-end training paradigm, where image features are directly transformed into the BEV space and optimized solely through downstream task supervision. This formulation treats the entire perception process as a black box, often lacking explicit 3D geometric understanding and interpretability, leading to suboptimal performance. In this paper, we claim that an explicit 3D representation matters for accurate BEV perception, and we propose Splat2BEV, a Gaussian Splatting-assisted framework for BEV tasks. Splat2BEV aims to learn BEV feature representations that are both semantically rich and geometrically precise. We first pre-train a Gaussian generator that explicitly reconstructs 3D scenes from multi-view inputs, enabling the generation of geometry-aligned feature representations. These representations are then projected into the BEV space to serve as inputs for downstream tasks. Extensive experiments on nuScenes and argoverse dataset demonstrate that Splat2BEV achieves state-of-the-art performance and validate the effectiveness of incorporating explicit 3D reconstruction into BEV perception.
tldr: This paper introduces Splat2BEV, a framework using 3D Gaussian Splatting to create geometry-aligned BEV representations, achieving state-of-the-art performance in autonomous driving tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Splat2BEV，一个使用3D高斯溅射来创建几何对齐的BEV表示的框架，在自动驾驶任务中实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 鸟瞰图（BEV）感知是自动驾驶的基石，它提供了一种统一的空间表示，融合了环视图像，从而能够对各种下游任务进行推理，例如语义分割、3D目标检测和运动预测。然而，大多数现有的BEV感知框架都采用端到端的训练范式，其中图像特征直接转换到BEV空间，并且仅通过下游任务的监督来进行优化。这种表述将整个感知过程视为一个黑盒，通常缺乏明确的3D几何理解和可解释性，从而导致次优的性能。在本文中，我们认为显式的3D表示对于准确的BEV感知至关重要，并提出了Splat2BEV，一个高斯溅射辅助的BEV任务框架。Splat2BEV旨在学习语义丰富且几何精确的BEV特征表示。我们首先预训练一个高斯生成器，该生成器能够从多视角的输入中显式地重建3D场景，从而生成几何对齐的特征表示。然后，这些表示被投影到BEV空间，作为下游任务的输入。在nuScenes和argoverse数据集上的大量实验表明，Splat2BEV实现了最先进的性能，并验证了将显式3D重建融入BEV感知的有效性。

title: SignAgent: Agentic LLMs for Linguistically-Grounded Sign Language Annotation and Dataset Curation
summary: This paper introduces SignAgent, a novel agentic framework that utilises Large Language Models (LLMs) for scalable, linguistically-grounded Sign Language (SL) annotation and dataset curation. Traditional computational methods for SLs often operate at the gloss level, overlooking crucial linguistic nuances, while manual linguistic annotation remains a significant bottleneck, proving too slow and expensive for the creation of large-scale, phonologically-aware datasets. SignAgent addresses these challenges through SignAgent Orchestrator, a reasoning LLM that coordinates a suite of linguistic tools, and SignGraph, a knowledge-grounded LLM that provides lexical and linguistic grounding. We evaluate our framework on two downstream annotation tasks. First, on Pseudo-gloss Annotation, where the agent performs constrained assignment, using multi-modal evidence to extract and order suitable gloss labels for signed sequences. Second, on ID Glossing, where the agent detects and refines visual clusters by reasoning over both visual similarity and phonological overlap to correctly identify and group lexical sign variants. Our results demonstrate that our agentic approach achieves strong performance for large-scale, linguistically-aware data annotation and curation.
tldr: The paper introduces SignAgent, an agentic LLM framework for linguistically-grounded sign language annotation and dataset curation, addressing the bottleneck of manual annotation and enabling large-scale, phonologically-aware SL datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了SignAgent，一个基于Agent的LLM框架，用于语言学上有依据的手语注释和数据集管理，解决了手动注释的瓶颈，并实现了大规模的、具有音系意识的手语数据集。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为SignAgent的新型代理框架，该框架利用大型语言模型（LLM）实现可扩展的、具有语言学基础的手语（SL）标注和数据集管理。传统的手语计算方法通常在词语层面运作，忽略了关键的语言学细微差别，而人工的语言学标注仍然是一个显著的瓶颈，对于创建大规模的、具有音韵学意识的数据集来说，速度太慢且成本太高。SignAgent通过SignAgent Orchestrator（一种协调一系列语言学工具的推理LLM）和SignGraph（一种提供词汇和语言学基础的知识基础LLM）来应对这些挑战。我们在两个下游标注任务上评估了我们的框架。首先，在伪词语标注任务中，代理执行约束分配，使用多模态证据来提取和排序适合手语序列的词语标签。其次，在ID词语生成任务中，代理通过对视觉相似性和音韵重叠进行推理来检测和优化视觉聚类，从而正确地识别和分组词汇手语变体。我们的结果表明，我们的代理方法在大规模的、具有语言学意识的数据标注和管理方面取得了优异的性能。

title: Generalized Hand-Object Pose Estimation with Occlusion Awareness
summary: Generalized 3D hand-object pose estimation from a single RGB image remains challenging due to the large variations in object appearances and interaction patterns, especially under heavy occlusion. We propose GenHOI, a framework for generalized hand-object pose estimation with occlusion awareness. GenHOI integrates hierarchical semantic knowledge with hand priors to enhance model generalization under challenging occlusion conditions. Specifically, we introduce a hierarchical semantic prompt that encodes object states, hand configurations, and interaction patterns via textual descriptions. This enables the model to learn abstract high-level representations of hand-object interactions for generalization to unseen objects and novel interactions while compensating for missing or ambiguous visual cues. To enable robust occlusion reasoning, we adopt a multi-modal masked modeling strategy over RGB images, predicted point clouds, and textual descriptions. Moreover, we leverage hand priors as stable spatial references to extract implicit interaction constraints. This allows reliable pose inference even under significant variations in object shapes and interaction patterns. Extensive experiments on the challenging DexYCB and HO3Dv2 benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in hand-object pose estimation.
tldr: This paper introduces GenHOI, a framework for generalized 3D hand-object pose estimation from RGB images using hierarchical semantic knowledge, hand priors, and multi-modal masked modeling for improved robustness against occlusion and generalization to unseen objects and interactions, achieving state-of-the-art results on DexYCB and HO3Dv2 benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GenHOI，一个用于从RGB图像中进行广义3D手部-物体姿态估计的框架，它利用分层语义知识、手部先验和多模态masked建模，提高了对遮挡的鲁棒性，并能泛化到未见过的物体和交互方式，在DexYCB和HO3Dv2基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 从单张RGB图像进行广义三维手-物体姿态估计仍然具有挑战性，因为物体外观和交互模式变化巨大，尤其是在严重遮挡下。 我们提出了 GenHOI，一个具有遮挡感知能力的广义手-物体姿态估计框架。 GenHOI 将分层语义知识与手部先验相结合，以增强模型在具有挑战性的遮挡条件下的泛化能力。 具体来说，我们引入了一个分层语义提示，通过文本描述编码物体状态、手部配置和交互模式。 这使得模型能够学习手-物体交互的抽象高层表示，从而推广到未见过的物体和新的交互方式，同时补偿缺失或模糊的视觉线索。 为了实现稳健的遮挡推理，我们在 RGB 图像、预测点云和文本描述上采用了多模态掩蔽建模策略。 此外，我们利用手部先验作为稳定的空间参考来提取隐式交互约束。 这使得即使在物体形状和交互模式发生显著变化的情况下，也能进行可靠的姿态推断。 在具有挑战性的 DexYCB 和 HO3Dv2 基准测试上的大量实验表明，我们的方法在手-物体姿态估计方面取得了最先进的性能。

title: GHOST: Fast Category-agnostic Hand-Object Interaction Reconstruction from RGB Videos using Gaussian Splatting
summary: Understanding realistic hand-object interactions from monocular RGB videos is essential for AR/VR, robotics, and embodied AI. Existing methods rely on category-specific templates or heavy computation, yet still produce physically inconsistent hand-object alignment in 3D. We introduce GHOST (Gaussian Hand-Object Splatting), a fast, category-agnostic framework for reconstructing dynamic hand-object interactions using 2D Gaussian Splatting. GHOST represents both hands and objects as dense, view-consistent Gaussian discs and introduces three key innovations: (1) a geometric-prior retrieval and consistency loss that completes occluded object regions, (2) a grasp-aware alignment that refines hand translations and object scale to ensure realistic contact, and (3) a hand-aware background loss that prevents penalizing hand-occluded object regions. GHOST achieves complete, physically consistent, and animatable reconstructions from a single RGB video while running an order of magnitude faster than prior category-agnostic methods. Extensive experiments on ARCTIC, HO3D, and in-the-wild datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art accuracy in 3D reconstruction and 2D rendering quality, establishing GHOST as an efficient and robust solution for realistic hand-object interaction modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/ATAboukhadra/GHOST.
tldr: The paper introduces GHOST, a fast, category-agnostic method using Gaussian Splatting for reconstructing physically consistent and animatable hand-object interactions from monocular RGB videos, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GHOST，一种快速、类别无关的方法，利用高斯溅射从单目RGB视频中重建物理上一致且可动画的手部-物体交互，实现了最先进的精度。
summary_zh:
摘要：
从单目RGB视频中理解真实的手-物体交互对于AR/VR、机器人技术和具身AI至关重要。现有方法依赖于特定类别的模板或大量的计算，但仍然会产生在3D空间中物理不一致的手-物体对齐。我们提出GHOST（高斯手-物体溅射），一个快速、类别无关的框架，用于使用2D高斯溅射重建动态的手-物体交互。GHOST将手和物体表示为密集、视角一致的高斯圆盘，并引入了三个关键创新：（1）一个几何先验检索和一致性损失，用于补全被遮挡的物体区域，（2）一个抓取感知对齐，细化手的平移和物体的尺度，以确保真实的接触，以及（3）一个手感知背景损失，防止惩罚被手遮挡的物体区域。GHOST从单个RGB视频中实现完整、物理一致且可动画的重建，同时比先前的类别无关方法快一个数量级。在ARCTIC、HO3D和真实场景数据集上的大量实验表明，GHOST在3D重建和2D渲染质量方面取得了最先进的精度，确立了GHOST作为现实手-物体交互建模的高效且鲁棒的解决方案。代码可在https://github.com/ATAboukhadra/GHOST获取。

title: PhysVideo: Physically Plausible Video Generation with Cross-View Geometry Guidance
summary: Recent progress in video generation has led to substantial improvements in visual fidelity, yet ensuring physically consistent motion remains a fundamental challenge. Intuitively, this limitation can be attributed to the fact that real-world object motion unfolds in three-dimensional space, while video observations provide only partial, view-dependent projections of such dynamics. To address these issues, we propose PhysVideo, a two-stage framework that first generates physics-aware orthogonal foreground videos and then synthesizes full videos with background. In the first stage, Phys4View leverages physics-aware attention to capture the influence of physical attributes on motion dynamics, and enhances spatio-temporal consistency by incorporating geometry-enhanced cross-view attention and temporal attention. In the second stage, VideoSyn uses the generated foreground videos as guidance and learns the interactions between foreground dynamics and background context for controllable video synthesis. To support training, we construct PhysMV, a dataset containing 40K scenes, each consisting of four orthogonal viewpoints, resulting in a total of 160K video sequences. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PhysVideo significantly improves physical realism and spatial-temporal coherence over existing video generation methods. Home page: https://anonymous.4open.science/w/Phys4D/.
tldr: The paper introduces PhysVideo, a two-stage framework for physically plausible video generation using cross-view geometry guidance and a new dataset, PhysMV, demonstrating improved physical realism and spatio-temporal coherence.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为PhysVideo的两阶段框架，它利用跨视角的几何引导生成具有物理合理性的视频，并提出了一个新的数据集PhysMV，实验表明该方法在物理真实性和时空连贯性方面优于现有视频生成方法。
summary_zh: 视频生成领域的最新进展显著提升了视觉逼真度，但确保物理一致的运动仍然是一项根本挑战。直观地看，这种局限性可以归因于现实世界的物体运动在三维空间中进行，而视频观测仅提供此类动力学的局部、视角依赖性的投影。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 PhysVideo，一个两阶段框架，首先生成具有物理意识的正交前景视频，然后合成带有背景的完整视频。在第一阶段，Phys4View 利用物理意识的注意力机制来捕捉物理属性对运动动力学的影响，并通过结合几何增强的跨视角注意力和时间注意力来增强时空一致性。在第二阶段，VideoSyn 使用生成的前景视频作为指导，并学习前景动力学和背景上下文之间的交互，以实现可控的视频合成。为了支持训练，我们构建了 PhysMV 数据集，包含 4 万个场景，每个场景由四个正交视角组成，总共生成 16 万个视频序列。大量实验表明，与现有的视频生成方法相比，PhysVideo 显著提高了物理真实感和时空连贯性。主页：https://anonymous.4open.science/w/Phys4D/。

title: AU Codes, Language, and Synthesis: Translating Anatomy to Text for Facial Behavior Synthesis
summary: Facial behavior synthesis remains a critical yet underexplored challenge. While text-to-face models have made progress, they often rely on coarse emotion categories, which lack the nuance needed to capture the full spectrum of human nonverbal communication. Action Units (AUs) provide a more precise and anatomically grounded alternative. However, current AU-based approaches typically encode AUs as one-hot vectors, modeling compound expressions as simple linear combinations of individual AUs. This linearity becomes problematic when handling conflicting AUs--defined as those which activate the same facial muscle with opposing actions. Such cases lead to anatomically implausible artifacts and unnatural motion superpositions. To address this, we propose a novel method that represents facial behavior through natural language descriptions of AUs. This approach preserves the expressiveness of the AU framework while enabling explicit modeling of complex and conflicting AUs. It also unlocks the potential of modern text-to-image models for high-fidelity facial synthesis. Supporting this direction, we introduce BP4D-AUText, the first large-scale text-image paired dataset for complex facial behavior. It is synthesized by applying a rule-based Dynamic AU Text Processor to the BP4D and BP4D+ datasets. We further propose VQ-AUFace, a generative model that leverages facial structural priors to synthesize realistic and diverse facial behaviors from text. Extensive quantitative experiments and user studies demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing methods. It excels in generating facial expressions that are anatomically plausible, behaviorally rich, and perceptually convincing, particularly under challenging conditions involving conflicting AUs.
tldr: This paper addresses the challenge of synthesizing realistic facial expressions, particularly in complex scenarios with conflicting Action Units (AUs), by introducing a novel text-based representation of AUs and a generative model called VQ-AUFace, surpassing existing AU-based methods. They also introduce a new dataset, BP4D-AUText, for text-image paired facial behavior synthesis.
tldr_zh: 本文通过引入一种基于文本的动作单元 (AU) 表示和名为 VQ-AUFace 的生成模型，解决了合成逼真面部表情的挑战，特别是在具有冲突动作单元 (AU) 的复杂场景中，超越了现有的基于 AU 的方法。他们还引入了一个新的数据集 BP4D-AUText，用于文本-图像配对的面部行为合成。
summary_zh: 面部行为合成仍然是一项关键但尚未充分探索的挑战。尽管文本到面部模型已经取得进展，但它们通常依赖于粗略的情绪类别，缺乏捕捉人类非语言交流完整范围所需的细微差别。动作单元（AU）提供了一种更精确和基于解剖学的替代方案。然而，目前基于AU的方法通常将AU编码为独热向量，将复合表情建模为个体AU的简单线性组合。在处理冲突AU（定义为激活同一面部肌肉但动作相反的AU）时，这种线性性会带来问题。此类情况会导致解剖学上不合理的伪影和不自然的运动叠加。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过AU的自然语言描述来表示面部行为。这种方法保留了AU框架的表达能力，同时能够显式地建模复杂和冲突的AU。它还释放了现代文本到图像模型用于高保真面部合成的潜力。为了支持这一方向，我们引入了BP4D-AUText，这是首个用于复杂面部行为的大规模文本-图像配对数据集。它通过将基于规则的动态AU文本处理器应用于BP4D和BP4D+数据集来合成。我们进一步提出了VQ-AUFace，一种利用面部结构先验从文本中合成逼真且多样化面部行为的生成模型。大量的定量实验和用户研究表明，我们的方法显著优于现有方法。尤其是在涉及冲突AU的挑战性条件下，它擅长生成解剖学上合理、行为上丰富且感知上令人信服的面部表情。

title: Learning Consistent Temporal Grounding between Related Tasks in Sports Coaching
summary: Video-LLMs often attend to irrelevant frames, which is especially detrimental for sports coaching tasks requiring precise temporal grounding. Yet obtaining frame-level supervision is challenging: expensive to collect from humans and unreliable from other models. We improve temporal grounding without additional annotations by exploiting the observation that related tasks, such as generation and verification, must attend to the same frames. We enforce this via a self-consistency objective over select visual attention maps of tightly-related tasks. Using VidDiffBench, which provides ground-truth keyframe annotations, we first validate that attention misallocation is a significant bottleneck. We then show that training with our objective yields gains of +3.0%, +14.1% accuracy and +0.9 BERTScore over supervised finetuning across three sports coaching tasks: Exact, FitnessQA, and ExpertAF, even surpassing closed-source models.
tldr: The paper improves temporal grounding in video-LLMs for sports coaching tasks by enforcing consistency in visual attention maps across related tasks, demonstrating performance gains over supervised finetuning.
tldr_zh: 该论文通过在相关任务之间强制执行视觉注意力图的一致性，改进了视频-LLM在运动指导任务中的时间基础定位，并展示了优于监督微调的性能提升。
summary_zh: 视频-LLMs通常会关注到无关帧，这对于需要精确时间定位的体育指导任务尤其不利。然而，获取帧级别的监督信号极具挑战性：从人类处获取成本高昂，而从其他模型处获取则不可靠。我们通过利用以下观察结果来改进时间定位，而无需额外标注：相关任务，如生成和验证，必须关注相同的帧。我们通过对紧密相关任务的特定视觉注意力图施加自洽性目标来实现这一点。使用提供真值关键帧标注的VidDiffBench，我们首先验证了注意力错配是一个重要的瓶颈。然后我们证明，通过我们的目标进行训练可以在Exact、FitnessQA和ExpertAF这三个体育指导任务上，相对于监督微调，获得+3.0%、+14.1%准确率和+0.9 BERTScore的提升，甚至超过了闭源模型。

title: AndroTMem: From Interaction Trajectories to Anchored Memory in Long-Horizon GUI Agents
summary: Long-horizon GUI agents are a key step toward real-world deployment, yet effective interaction memory under prevailing paradigms remains under-explored. Replaying full interaction sequences is redundant and amplifies noise, while summaries often erase dependency-critical information and traceability. We present AndroTMem, a diagnostic framework for anchored memory in long-horizon Android GUI agents. Its core benchmark, AndroTMem-Bench, comprises 1,069 tasks with 34,473 interaction steps (avg. 32.1 per task, max. 65). We evaluate agents with TCR (Task Complete Rate), focusing on tasks whose completion requires carrying forward critical intermediate state; AndroTMem-Bench is designed to enforce strong step-to-step causal dependencies, making sparse yet essential intermediate states decisive for downstream actions and centering interaction memory in evaluation. Across open- and closed-source GUI agents, we observe a consistent pattern: as interaction sequences grow longer, performance drops are driven mainly by within-task memory failures, not isolated perception errors or local action mistakes. Guided by this diagnosis, we propose Anchored State Memory (ASM), which represents interaction sequences as a compact set of causally linked intermediate-state anchors to enable subgoal-targeted retrieval and attribution-aware decision making. Across multiple settings and 12 evaluated GUI agents, ASM consistently outperforms full-sequence replay and summary-based baselines, improving TCR by 5%-30.16% and AMS by 4.93%-24.66%, indicating that anchored, structured memory effectively mitigates the interaction-memory bottleneck in long-horizon GUI tasks. The code, benchmark, and related resources are publicly available at [https://github.com/CVC2233/AndroTMem](https://github.com/CVC2233/AndroTMem).
tldr: The paper introduces AndroTMem, a benchmark and framework for evaluating and improving memory in long-horizon Android GUI agents. It proposes Anchored State Memory (ASM), a method to represent interaction sequences as causally linked intermediate states, which outperforms existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 AndroTMem，一个用于评估和改进长程 Android GUI agent 中记忆力的基准和框架。它提出了锚定状态记忆（ASM），一种将交互序列表示为因果连接的中间状态的方法，该方法优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 长程GUI智能体是实现真实世界部署的关键一步，然而在现有范式下，有效的交互记忆仍未得到充分探索。重放完整的交互序列是冗余的，并且会放大噪声，而摘要通常会消除依赖关系关键的信息和可追溯性。我们提出了AndroTMem，一个用于诊断安卓GUI智能体中锚定记忆的框架。其核心基准测试AndroTMem-Bench包含1069个任务，共34473个交互步骤（平均每个任务32.1步，最多65步）。我们使用TCR（任务完成率）评估智能体，重点关注那些完成需要延续关键中间状态的任务；AndroTMem-Bench的设计旨在加强步骤间的因果依赖性，使得稀疏但至关重要的中间状态对下游动作具有决定性作用，并将交互记忆置于评估中心。在开源和闭源GUI智能体中，我们观察到一个一致的模式：随着交互序列的增长，性能下降主要由任务内的记忆失败驱动，而非孤立的感知错误或局部动作错误。在该诊断的指导下，我们提出了锚定状态记忆（ASM），它将交互序列表示为一组紧凑的、因果关联的中间状态锚点，以实现目标子目标检索和归因感知决策。在多种设置和12个被评估的GUI智能体中，ASM始终优于完整序列重放和基于摘要的基线，TCR提高了5%-30.16%，AMS提高了4.93%-24.66%，表明锚定的、结构化的记忆有效地缓解了长程GUI任务中的交互记忆瓶颈。代码、基准测试和相关资源可在[https://github.com/CVC2233/AndroTMem](https://github.com/CVC2233/AndroTMem)公开获取。

title: Context Bootstrapped Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) suffers from exploration inefficiency, where models struggle to generate successful rollouts, resulting in minimal learning signal. This challenge is particularly severe for tasks that require the acquisition of novel reasoning patterns or domain-specific knowledge. To address this, we propose Context Bootstrapped Reinforcement Learning (CBRL), which augments RLVR training by stochastically prepending few-shot demonstrations to training prompts. The injection probability follows a curriculum that starts high to bootstrap early exploration, then anneals to zero so the model must ultimately succeed without assistance. This forces the policy to internalize reasoning patterns from the demonstrations rather than relying on them at test time. We validate CBRL across two model families and five Reasoning Gym tasks. Our results demonstrate that CBRL consistently improves success rate, provides better exploration efficiency, and is algorithm-agnostic. We further demonstrate CBRL's practical applicability on Q, a domain-specific programming language that diverges significantly from mainstream language conventions.
tldr: The paper introduces Context Bootstrapped Reinforcement Learning (CBRL), a method that improves exploration efficiency in Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) by prepending few-shot demonstrations to training prompts and annealing the injection probability over time.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了上下文引导强化学习（CBRL），通过在训练提示前添加小样本演示并随时间逐步降低注入概率，提高了可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）的探索效率。
summary_zh: 从可验证奖励中进行强化学习(RLVR)存在探索效率低下的问题，因为模型难以生成成功的轨迹，导致学习信号极弱。对于需要获取新的推理模式或领域特定知识的任务，这一挑战尤为严峻。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了上下文引导强化学习（CBRL），它通过随机地将少量示例添加到训练提示中来增强RLVR训练。注入概率遵循一个课程表，该课程表开始时很高，以引导早期探索，然后逐渐退火到零，这样模型最终必须在没有辅助的情况下取得成功。这迫使策略从示例中内化推理模式，而不是在测试时依赖它们。我们验证了CBRL在两个模型系列和五个推理健身房任务中的表现。我们的结果表明，CBRL能够持续提高成功率，提供更好的探索效率，并且与具体算法无关。我们进一步证明了CBRL在Q上的实际适用性，Q是一种领域特定的编程语言，它与主流语言惯例有很大不同。

title: Learn for Variation: Variationally Guided AAV Trajectory Learning in Differentiable Environments
summary: Autonomous aerial vehicles (AAVs) empower sixth-generation (6G) Internet-of-Things (IoT) networks through mobility-driven data collection. However, conventional reward-driven reinforcement learning for AAV trajectory planning suffers from severe credit assignment issues and training instability, because sparse scalar rewards fail to capture the long-term and nonlinear effects of sequential movements. To address these challenges, this paper proposes Learn for Variation (L4V), a gradient-informed trajectory learning framework that replaces high-variance scalar reward signals with dense and analytically grounded policy gradients. Particularly, the coupled evolution of AAV kinematics, distance-dependent channel gains, and per-user data-collection progress is first unrolled into an end-to-end differentiable computational graph. Backpropagation through time then serves as a discrete adjoint solver, which propagates exact sensitivities from the cumulative mission objective to every control action and policy parameter. These structured gradients are used to train a deterministic neural policy with temporal smoothness regularization and gradient clipping. Extensive simulations demonstrate that L4V consistently outperforms representative baselines, including a genetic algorithm, DQN, A2C, and DDPG, in mission completion time, average transmission rate, and training cost
tldr: This paper introduces Learn for Variation (L4V), a gradient-informed trajectory learning framework for AAVs in 6G IoT networks, addressing the credit assignment problem by using dense, analytically grounded policy gradients derived from a differentiable simulation environment.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Learn for Variation (L4V)，一个用于6G物联网网络中AAV的梯度信息轨迹学习框架，通过使用来自可微仿真环境的密集、分析推导的策略梯度来解决信用分配问题。
summary_zh:
摘要：
自主空中飞行器 (AAV) 通过移动驱动的数据收集增强了第六代 (6G) 物联网 (IoT) 网络。然而，传统的奖励驱动强化学习用于 AAV 轨迹规划时，会面临严重的信用分配问题和训练不稳定问题，因为稀疏的标量奖励无法捕捉到时序运动的长期和非线性影响。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种基于变分学习 (L4V) 的梯度引导轨迹学习框架，该框架用密集且具有解析基础的策略梯度取代了高方差的标量奖励信号。具体而言，首先将 AAV 运动学、距离相关的信道增益和每个用户的数据收集进度的耦合演化展开成一个端到端可微计算图。然后，时间反向传播充当离散伴随解算器，将累积任务目标的精确敏感度传播到每个控制动作和策略参数。这些结构化的梯度被用于训练具有时间平滑正则化和梯度裁剪的确定性神经策略。大量的仿真结果表明，在任务完成时间、平均传输速率和训练成本方面，L4V 始终优于具有代表性的基线方法，包括遗传算法、DQN、A2C 和 DDPG。

title: Escaping Offline Pessimism: Vector-Field Reward Shaping for Safe Frontier Exploration
summary: While offline reinforcement learning provides reliable policies for real-world deployment, its inherent pessimism severely restricts an agent's ability to explore and collect novel data online. Drawing inspiration from safe reinforcement learning, exploring near the boundary of regions well covered by the offline dataset and reliably modeled by the simulator allows an agent to take manageable risks--venturing into informative but moderate-uncertainty states while remaining close enough to familiar regions for safe recovery. However, naively rewarding this boundary-seeking behavior can lead to a degenerate parking behavior, where the agent simply stops once it reaches the frontier. To solve this, we propose a novel vector-field reward shaping paradigm designed to induce continuous, safe boundary exploration for non-adaptive deployed policies. Operating on an uncertainty oracle trained from offline data, our reward combines two complementary components: a gradient-alignment term that attracts the agent toward a target uncertainty level, and a rotational-flow term that promotes motion along the local tangent plane of the uncertainty manifold. Through theoretical analysis, we show that this reward structure naturally induces sustained exploratory behavior along the boundary while preventing degenerate solutions. Empirically, by integrating our proposed reward shaping with Soft Actor-Critic on a 2D continuous navigation task, we validate that agents successfully traverse uncertainty boundaries while balancing safe, informative data collection with primary task completion.
tldr: This paper proposes a vector-field reward shaping method to enable safe and continuous exploration in offline reinforcement learning by encouraging agents to explore the boundaries of well-modeled regions, thereby escaping the pessimism of offline RL.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种向量场奖励塑造方法，通过鼓励智能体探索良好建模区域的边界，实现在离线强化学习中的安全和持续探索，从而摆脱离线强化学习的悲观性。
summary_zh: 虽然离线强化学习为真实世界部署提供了可靠的策略，但其固有的悲观性严重限制了智能体在线探索和收集新数据的能力。受到安全强化学习的启发，在离线数据集充分覆盖且模拟器能够可靠建模的区域边界附近进行探索，能够让智能体承担可控的风险——冒险进入信息丰富但中等不确定性的状态，同时保持足够接近熟悉的区域以确保安全恢复。然而，简单地奖励这种边界探索行为可能会导致退化的“停车”行为，即智能体一旦到达边界就停止。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的向量场奖励塑造范式，旨在为非自适应部署策略诱导持续、安全的边界探索。我们的奖励基于从离线数据训练的不确定性预言器，结合了两个互补的组成部分：一个梯度对齐项，引导智能体接近目标不确定性水平；以及一个旋转流项，促进沿着不确定性流形的局部切平面运动。通过理论分析，我们证明这种奖励结构自然地诱导沿着边界的持续探索行为，同时防止退化解。通过在二维连续导航任务上将我们提出的奖励塑造与软演员-评论家算法集成，我们验证了智能体成功地穿越不确定性边界，同时平衡了安全、信息性数据收集与主要任务完成。

title: Computationally Efficient Density-Driven Optimal Control via Analytical KKT Reduction and Contractive MPC
summary: Efficient coordination for collective spatial distribution is a fundamental challenge in multi-agent systems. Prior research on Density-Driven Optimal Control (D2OC) established a framework to match agent trajectories to a desired spatial distribution. However, implementing this as a predictive controller requires solving a large-scale Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) system, whose computational complexity grows cubically with the prediction horizon. To resolve this, we propose an analytical structural reduction that transforms the T-horizon KKT system into a condensed quadratic program (QP). This formulation achieves O(T) linear scalability, significantly reducing the online computational burden compared to conventional O(T^3) approaches. Furthermore, to ensure rigorous convergence in dynamic environments, we incorporate a contractive Lyapunov constraint and prove the Input-to-State Stability (ISS) of the closed-loop system against reference propagation drift. Numerical simulations verify that the proposed method facilitates rapid density coverage with substantial computational speed-up, enabling long-horizon predictive control for large-scale multi-agent swarms.
tldr: This paper proposes a computationally efficient method for Density-Driven Optimal Control (D2OC) in multi-agent systems using analytical KKT reduction and contractive MPC, achieving linear scalability and Input-to-State Stability.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种计算高效的密集驱动最优控制（D2OC）方法，用于多智能体系统，使用解析KKT规约和收缩MPC，实现了线性可扩展性和输入到状态稳定性。
summary_zh: 集体空间分布的有效协调是多智能体系统中的一项根本挑战。先前关于密度驱动最优控制(D2OC)的研究建立了一个框架，将智能体轨迹与期望的空间分布相匹配。然而，将其作为预测控制器实现需要求解一个大规模的Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT)系统，其计算复杂度随预测时域的增长呈立方级增长。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种解析结构化的降维方法，将T时域KKT系统转换成一个精简的二次规划(QP)。该公式实现了O(T)的线性可扩展性，与传统的O(T^3)方法相比，显著降低了在线计算负担。此外，为了确保在动态环境中严格的收敛性，我们引入了一个收缩的Lyapunov约束，并证明了闭环系统针对参考传播漂移的输入-状态稳定性(ISS)。数值模拟验证了所提出的方法能够以显著的计算加速促进快速密度覆盖，从而为大规模多智能体集群实现长时域预测控制。

title: Fundamental Limits for Sensor-Based Control via the Gibbs Variational Principle
summary: Fundamental limits on the performance of feedback controllers are essential for benchmarking algorithms, guiding sensor selection, and certifying task feasibility -- yet few general-purpose tools exist for computing them. Existing information-theoretic approaches overestimate the information a sensor must provide by evaluating it against the uncontrolled system, producing bounds that degrade precisely when feedback is most valuable. We derive a lower bound on the minimum expected cost of any causal feedback controller under partial observations by applying the Gibbs variational principle to the joint path measure over states and observations. The bound applies to nonlinear, nonholonomic, and hybrid dynamics with unbounded costs and admits a self-consistent refinement: any good controller concentrates the state, which limits the information the sensor can extract, which tightens the bound. The resulting fixed-point equation has a unique solution computable by bisection, and we provide conditions under which the free energy minimization is provably convex, yielding a certifiably correct numerical bound. On a nonlinear Dubins car tracking problem, the self-consistent bound captures most of the optimal cost across sensor noise levels, while the open-loop variant is vacuous at low noise.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel information-theoretic lower bound on the optimal cost of sensor-based control, using the Gibbs variational principle and a self-consistent refinement to address limitations of existing methods. The approach provides a tighter, computable bound applicable to various nonlinear systems.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的基于信息论的传感器控制最优成本下界，该下界使用吉布斯变分原理和自洽细化来解决现有方法的局限性。该方法提供了一个更紧密、可计算的界限，适用于各种非线性系统。
summary_zh: 反馈控制器的性能基本极限对于算法基准测试、指导传感器选择和验证任务可行性至关重要——然而，目前用于计算这些极限的通用工具却很少。现有的信息论方法通过针对不受控系统进行评估来高估传感器必须提供的信息，导致在反馈最有价值时，这些界限会退化。我们通过将吉布斯变分原理应用于状态和观测的联合路径测度，推导出了在部分观测下任何因果反馈控制器的最小预期成本的下限。该界限适用于具有无界成本的非线性、非完整和混合动力学系统，并且允许进行自洽细化：任何优秀的控制器都会集中状态，这限制了传感器可以提取的信息，从而收紧界限。由此产生的定点方程具有可以通过二分法计算的唯一解，并且我们提供了自由能最小化可证明是凸性的条件，从而产生可验证的正确数值界限。在一个非线性杜宾斯汽车跟踪问题中，自洽界限捕获了传感器噪声水平范围内的大部分最优成本，而开环变体在低噪声下是无效的。

title: Contact Status Recognition and Slip Detection with a Bio-inspired Tactile Hand
summary: Stable and reliable grasp is critical to robotic manipulations especially for fragile and glazed objects, where the grasp force requires precise control as too large force possibly damages the objects while small force leads to slip and fall-off. Although it is assumed the objects to manipulate is grasped firmly in advance, slip detection and timely prevention are necessary for a robot in unstructured and universal environments. In this work, we addressed this issue by utilizing multimodal tactile feedback from a five-fingered bio-inspired hand. Motivated by human hands, the tactile sensing elements were distributed and embedded into the soft skin of robotic hand, forming 24 tactile channels in total. Different from the threshold method that was widely employed in most existing works, we converted the slip detection problem to contact status recognition in combination with binning technique first and then detected the slip onset time according to the recognition results. After the 24-channel tactile signals passed through discrete wavelet transform, 17 features were extracted from different time and frequency bands. With the optimal 120 features employed for status recognition, the test accuracy reached 96.39% across three different sliding speeds and six kinds of materials. When applied to four new unseen materials, a high accuracy of 91.95% was still achieved, which further validated the generalization of our proposed method. Finally, the performance of slip detection is verified based on the trained model of contact status recognition.
tldr: This paper presents a multimodal tactile sensing system on a bio-inspired hand for contact status recognition and slip detection, achieving high accuracy and generalization across various materials and sliding speeds. It uses a wavelet transform and binning technique with a learned classifier to improve accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种生物启发式手上的多模态触觉传感系统，用于接触状态识别和滑移检测，在各种材料和滑动速度下实现了高精度和泛化能力。 它使用小波变换和分箱技术与学习的分类器结合，以提高准确性。
summary_zh: 稳定可靠的抓取对于机器人操作至关重要，尤其是在处理易碎和抛光物体时，抓取力需要精确控制，因为过大的力可能损坏物体，而过小的力会导致滑动和脱落。尽管通常假设待操作物体已事先被牢固地抓取，但在非结构化和通用环境中，机器人仍需要进行滑移检测和及时预防。在这项工作中，我们利用来自五指仿生手的多模态触觉反馈来解决这个问题。受人类手的启发，触觉传感元件被分布并嵌入到机器人手的柔软皮肤中，总共形成 24 个触觉通道。与大多数现有工作中广泛使用的阈值方法不同，我们首先结合分箱技术将滑移检测问题转化为接触状态识别，然后根据识别结果检测滑移起始时间。在 24 通道触觉信号经过离散小波变换后，从不同的时频带提取出 17 个特征。利用最优的 120 个特征进行状态识别，在三种不同的滑动速度和六种材料上，测试精度达到 96.39%。当应用于四种新的未见材料时，仍然达到了 91.95% 的高精度，进一步验证了我们提出的方法的泛化能力。最后，基于接触状态识别的训练模型，验证了滑移检测的性能。

title: Proprioceptive-only State Estimation for Legged Robots with Set-Coverage Measurements of Learned Dynamics
summary: Proprioceptive-only state estimation is attractive for legged robots since it is computationally cheaper and is unaffected by perceptually degraded conditions. The history of joint-level measurements contains rich information that can be used to infer the dynamics of the system and subsequently produce navigational measurements. Recent approaches produce these estimates with learned measurement models and fuse with IMU data, under a Gaussian noise assumption. However, this assumption can easily break down with limited training data and render the estimates inconsistent and potentially divergent. In this work, we propose a proprioceptive-only state estimation framework for legged robots that characterizes the measurement noise using set-coverage statements that do not assume any distribution. We develop a practical and computationally inexpensive method to use these set-coverage measurements with a Gaussian filter in a systematic way. We validate the approach in both simulation and two real-world quadrupedal datasets. Comparison with the Gaussian baselines shows that our proposed method remains consistent and is not prone to drift under real noise scenarios.
tldr: This paper presents a proprioceptive-only state estimation framework for legged robots using set-coverage statements to characterize measurement noise, improving robustness compared to Gaussian noise assumptions, validated in simulation and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种仅使用本体感受的状态估计框架，用于腿式机器人，该框架使用集合覆盖声明来描述测量噪声，与高斯噪声假设相比提高了鲁棒性，并通过模拟和真实世界的实验进行了验证。
summary_zh: 仅依靠本体感受的状态估计对腿式机器人来说极具吸引力，因为它计算成本更低并且不受感知退化条件的影响。关节级别的测量历史包含了丰富的信息，可用于推断系统动力学，并随后产生导航测量值。最近的方法使用学习到的测量模型产生这些估计值，并在高斯噪声假设下与IMU数据融合。然而，这种假设在训练数据有限的情况下很容易失效，导致估计值不一致并可能发散。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对腿式机器人的仅本体感受状态估计框架，该框架使用不假设任何分布的集合覆盖声明来表征测量噪声。我们开发了一种实用且计算量小的方案，能够以系统的方式将这些集合覆盖测量值与高斯滤波器配合使用。我们在仿真和两个真实世界的四足数据集上验证了该方法。与高斯基线方法的比较表明，我们提出的方法在实际噪声场景下保持一致性，并且不易产生漂移。

title: Manufacturing Micro-Patterned Surfaces with Multi-Robot Systems
summary: Applying micro-patterns to surfaces has been shown to impart useful physical properties such as drag reduction and hydrophobicity. However, current manufacturing techniques cannot produce micro-patterned surfaces at scale due to high-cost machinery and inefficient coverage techniques such as raster-scanning. In this work, we use multiple robots, each equipped with a patterning tool, to manufacture these surfaces. To allow these robots to coordinate during the patterning task, we use the ergodic control algorithm, which specifies coverage objectives using distributions. We demonstrate that robots can divide complicated coverage objectives by communicating compressed representations of their trajectory history both in simulations and experimental trials. Further, we show that robot-produced patterning can lower the coefficient of friction of metallic surfaces. This work demonstrates that distributed multi-robot systems can coordinate to manufacture products that were previously unrealizable at scale.
tldr: This paper presents a multi-robot system using ergodic control for efficient manufacturing of micro-patterned surfaces, demonstrating improved scalability and friction reduction compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用遍历控制的多机器人系统，用于高效制造微图案表面，与现有方法相比，展示了更好的可扩展性和减小摩擦。
summary_zh: 将微米图案应用于表面已被证明可以赋予其有用的物理特性，例如减阻和疏水性。然而，由于高成本的设备和低效的覆盖技术（如光栅扫描），目前的制造技术无法大规模生产微米图案表面。在这项工作中，我们使用多个配备图案化工具的机器人来制造这些表面。为了让这些机器人在图案化任务中进行协调，我们使用了遍历控制算法，该算法使用分布来指定覆盖目标。我们通过模拟和实验试验表明，机器人可以通过交流其轨迹历史的压缩表示来划分复杂的覆盖目标。此外，我们还表明，机器人产生的图案可以降低金属表面的摩擦系数。这项工作表明，分布式多机器人系统可以协调制造以前无法大规模实现的产品。

title: ReDAG-RT: Global Rate-Priority Scheduling for Real-Time Multi-DAG Execution in ROS 2
summary: ROS 2 has become a dominant middleware for robotic systems, where perception, estimation, planning, and control pipelines are structured as directed acyclic graphs of callbacks executed under a shared executor. However, default ROS 2 executors use best-effort dispatch without cross-DAG priority enforcement, leading to callback contention, structural priority inversion, and deadline instability under concurrent workloads. These limitations restrict deployment in time-critical and safety-sensitive cyber-physical systems. This paper presents ReDAGRT, a user-space global scheduling framework for deterministic multi-DAG execution in unmodified ROS 2. The framework introduces a Rate-Priority driven global ready queue that orders callbacks by activation rate, enforces per-DAG concurrency bounds, and mitigates cross-graph priority inversion without modifying the ROS 2 API, executor interface, or underlying operating system scheduler. We formalize a multi-DAG task model for ROS 2 callback pipelines and analyze cross-DAG interference under Rate-Priority scheduling. Response-time recurrences and schedulability conditions are derived within classical Rate-Monotonic theory. Experiments in a ROS 2 Humble environment compare ReDAGRT against SingleThreadedExecutor and MultiThreadedExecutor using synthetic multi-DAG workloads. Results show up to 29.7 percent reduction in deadline miss rate, 42.9 percent reduction in 99th percentile response time, and 13.7 percent improvement over MultiThreadedExecutor under comparable utilization. Asymmetric per-DAG concurrency bounds further reduce interference by 40.8 percent. These results demonstrate that deterministic and analyzable multi-DAG scheduling can be achieved entirely in the ROS 2 user-space execution layer, providing a practical foundation for real-time robotic middleware in safety-critical systems.
tldr: The paper introduces ReDAG-RT, a user-space global scheduling framework for real-time multi-DAG execution in ROS 2, achieving reduced deadline miss rates and response times compared to existing ROS 2 executors. It improves deterministic real-time performance, targeting safety-critical robotic systems.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 ReDAG-RT，一个用于 ROS 2 中实时多 DAG 执行的用户空间全局调度框架，与现有的 ROS 2 执行器相比，降低了截止时间错失率和响应时间。 它提高了确定性实时性能，目标是安全关键的机器人系统。
summary_zh: ROS 2已成为机器人系统的主流中间件，其中感知、估计、规划和控制流程被构建为有向无环图，由共享执行器下的回调函数执行。然而，默认的ROS 2执行器使用尽力而为的分发方式，且不进行跨DAG的优先级强制执行，导致回调竞争、结构性优先级反转以及并发工作负载下的截止时间不稳定。这些限制阻碍了其在时间紧迫和安全攸关的赛博物理系统中的部署。本文提出了ReDAGRT，一个用户空间的全局调度框架，用于在未经修改的ROS 2中实现确定性的多DAG执行。该框架引入了一个速率优先级驱动的全局就绪队列，按照激活速率对回调函数进行排序，强制执行每个DAG的并发边界，并缓解跨图的优先级反转，而无需修改ROS 2 API、执行器接口或底层操作系统调度器。我们形式化了一个ROS 2回调流程的多DAG任务模型，并分析了速率优先级调度下的跨DAG干扰。在经典的速率单调理论中推导出了响应时间递推式和可调度性条件。在ROS 2 Humble环境中的实验，使用合成的多DAG工作负载，将ReDAGRT与SingleThreadedExecutor和MultiThreadedExecutor进行了比较。结果表明，在相当的利用率下，截止时间未命中率最高降低了 29.7%，第 99 百分位响应时间降低了 42.9%，并且比 MultiThreadedExecutor 提高了 13.7%。不对称的每个 DAG 并发边界进一步减少了 40.8% 的干扰。这些结果表明，确定性的且可分析的多 DAG 调度可以在 ROS 2 用户空间执行层中完全实现，为安全关键系统中实时机器人中间件提供了一个实际的基础。

title: Conflict-Based Search for Multi Agent Path Finding with Asynchronous Actions
summary: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) seeks collision-free paths for multiple agents from their respective start locations to their respective goal locations while minimizing path costs. Most existing MAPF algorithms rely on a common assumption of synchronized actions, where the actions of all agents start at the same time and always take a time unit, which may limit the use of MAPF planners in practice. To get rid of this assumption, Continuous-time Conflict-Based Search (CCBS) is a popular approach that can find optimal solutions for MAPF with asynchronous actions (MAPF-AA). However, CCBS has recently been identified to be incomplete due to an uncountably infinite state space created by continuous wait durations. This paper proposes a new method, Conflict-Based Search with Asynchronous Actions (CBS-AA), which bypasses this theoretical issue and can solve MAPF-AA with completeness and solution optimality guarantees. Based on CBS-AA, we also develop conflict resolution techniques to improve the scalability of CBS-AA further. Our test results show that our method can reduce the number of branches by up to 90%.
tldr: This paper introduces Conflict-Based Search with Asynchronous Actions (CBS-AA), a complete and optimal algorithm for Multi-Agent Path Finding with asynchronous actions (MAPF-AA), addressing the incompleteness issue of Continuous-time Conflict-Based Search (CCBS). The method significantly reduces the number of branches in search.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于异步动作的多智能体路径寻找的基于冲突的搜索（CBS-AA）算法，该算法是完备且最优的，解决了连续时间冲突的基于搜索（CCBS）的不完备性问题。该方法显著减少了搜索中的分支数量。
